content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak with Nifty -0.75%, IT cratering -3.34% on Infy guidance, VIX up +3.44% to 19.23 signaling rising volatility. Global cues negative (US markets -0.4% to -0.9%). Book is 79% deployed with no cash cushion for new adds. Priority is position management — trail SLs on winners, reduce risk on laggards.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact — strong Q4 (+34.9% PAT), PSU bank leadership. Down -5.9% today after one-day pullback from 52W high pop. CMP 76.68 vs SL 75.00 — SL very close; do not tighten further or risk whipsaw. Keep existing SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry (breakeven) per current data — no change. Emitting HOLD via position_actions instead; MODIFY not needed here — removing."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. -1.3% minor drawdown, SL at 119 gives adequate room. Gold softer post-Akshaya Tritiya seasonal lull but VIX rising supports safe-haven narrative. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1665.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1704.81 is ABOVE CMP 1696.50 — SL has effectively triggered logically; if left would stop out intraday on noise. Loosening to 1665 (just below today's low 1685 with buffer) would be rejected as loosening. Leaving SL as-is may trigger immediate exit on next tick. Keeping HOLD disposition."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +0.3% only, SL at 1385 gives room. Q4 beat strong, FMCG relative strength today. Too early to trail — not yet at +2% threshold. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 27 — binary event. Relative strength exceptional (near 52W high while banks weak). +1.1% not yet at trail threshold. SL 1030 adequate. Hold into results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Near 52W high, +1.5% gain. SL 665 gives room. Below +2% threshold for trail. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, Q4 results April 30. SL 2260 adequate buffer. Hold into earnings catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.9%, SL 388 gives room. Summer demand catalyst intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Q4 concall April 29 — binary. Already +35% MTD, trading above street target 177. Flat today. SL 205 adequate. JM expects PAT decline Q4 — do not add. Hold into results; consider exit post-event."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At -5.9% with SL at 75 (very tight to CMP 76.68). Thesis strong per Q4 results. Do not tighten — risk of whipsaw out of a quality name."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry (984). Up +2.7%; per trail mandate should raise to breakeven — already there. No-op MODIFY avoided."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Minor drawdown, defensive hedge. SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1704.81 is now ABOVE CMP 1696.50 — effectively a live stop. Cannot loosen (would be rejected). Will likely exit on next tick via SL trigger; that is acceptable given this is the best performer and we lock in small gain. Letting the existing SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Only +0.3% — below trail threshold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Binary Q4 event April 27. +1.1% below trail threshold. SL 1030 gives pre-event room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.5%, below +2% trail trigger. SL 665 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Minor drawdown; Q4 results April 30 catalyst. SL 2260 gives buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small drawdown; sector narrative intact with summer demand."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Binary Q4 concall April 29. Already above street target; intend to reassess post-event. Not trailing tighter pre-event to avoid vol-driven stop-out."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL impressive +7% Q4-driven move, strong fundamentals (+33% PAT, anode facility) but chasing a gap-up at 52W high into a weak tape is poor R:R. Will watch for pullback toward 540-550. OFSS volume divergence and CLEAN 12.8x volume spike warrant continued monitoring for next session. INFY — wait for stabilization/base, no capitulation catch yet. CPSEETF near 52W high — would consider if we had cash, but book already has NTPC/ADANIPOWER/TORNTPOWER power exposure — cluster risk.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed (at the 80% cap) with no meaningful cash for new adds — guardrail forces NO_ACTION on entries regardless. CLUSTER WATCH: Power theme (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) = ~12% of capital, within limits but monitoring. Financials cluster (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) = ~28% — at the upper end; no more financial adds. Two binary events this week: AUBANK Apr 27, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30 — book has meaningful event risk. VIX rising is a warning sign; preserve capital, let SLs do their job. TORNTPOWER SL likely triggers today locking in a small gain — acceptable outcome."
}
